prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ZIPPERPULLCOMPASS-BLK-2PK Product Type: NAVIGATION_COMPASS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 2pk Zipper Pull Mini Pocket Compass Survival Gear Prepper Supplies Description: While a compass might seem like an unnecessary gadget in this modern day and age, it could save your life and the life of others, if primary mobile or GPS devices fail. If you’re stuck in unfamiliar terrain or have plans to explore the backcountry, having a compass can help to navigate you back on course and back to safety.

Sold as pack of two, both compasses together weigh in at 0.02lbs! Incredibly lightweight, including them with your survival gear and supplies, hiking gear or camping gear won’t add any additional extra weight; and, since they conveniently have zipper attachments built in, these pocket compasses can easily be strapped on to your person via a jacket, cargo pocket or hiking boots, or alternatively, to backpacks or other close proximity bags and gear.

The nylon zipper attachment configuration is ideal, not only to help lighten your gear load, but to help maintain your heading without having to stop and unpack gear for other navigational gear. And, filled with liquid for smooth rotations and movement, the fluid filled housing dampens the motion of the needle, meaning you don’t have to be perfectly still to achieve accurate readings when you’re on the go, especially if time or daylight aren’t on your side.

A must have survival gear and emergency preparedness item. Zipper pulls measure 3 inches. Compass diameter measure 0.75 inches. Sold as set of two. Search Terms: Survival kit tools camping hiking skiing snowboarding backpacking survival gear bug out bag emergency preparedness items first aid kit prepper supplies roadside emergency car kit camping essentials hiking accessories mens jacket womens fleece jacket Features: - COMPASS: Pack this lightweight mini compass or pocket compass on your next day hike or weekend camping trip; the zipper attachment configuration is ideal to not only help lighten your gear load, but maintain your heading on the go without having to dig for a primary compass - LIQUID FILLED HIKING COMPASS: Filled with liquid for smooth rotations and movements, the fluid filled housing dampens the motion of the needle, meaning you don’t have to be perfectly still to achieve accurate readings when you’re on the go - HIKING AND CAMPING GEAR: With three inch built in zipper pulls, the compass can easily attach to a myriad of outdoor gear, whether it be backpacks, jackets, hiking boots, cargo pockets, first aid kits, roadside emergency car kits and much more - SURVIVAL GEAR AND SUPPLIES: While a compass might seem like an unnecessary gadget in this day and age, it could save your life if other devices fail; the lightweight design won’t add weight to your gear and can help to navigate through unfamiliar terrain and get back you on course, whether you’re hiking, backpacking or exploring the backcountry - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 3 inch zipper pulls, 0.75 inch compass diameter; Weight: 0.02lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-pk Black Zipper Pull Mini Pocket Compass
